title: galium vulgare var. scabrum
intro: Galium vulgare var. scabrum, also known as prickly bedstraw, is a variety of the common bedstraw plant that is characterized by its prickly stems and leaves. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Galium vulgare var. scabrum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal benefits, and its leaves and stems can be used fresh or dried for herbal remedies.
